title: salix × langeana
intro: Salix × langeana, also known as Lange's willow, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Salicaceae family, resulting from the cross between Salix alba and Salix fragilis. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and astringent effects, which can help alleviate conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Salix × langeana include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as a natural antiseptic. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
